name: PT Matahari Department Store Tbk
summary: PT Matahari Department Store Tbk engages in the retail business in Indonesia. Its stores offer clothes, accessories, bags, shoes, cosmetics, homeware, and household appliances for men, women, and children. The company also provides management consulting services. As of December 31, 2019, it operated 169 stores. The company was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia.
